name: Table Search
description: Search results interactive guidance - no-results state, search results table, search field states, and footer.
searchInteraction: The search results appear in the following table instead of the original data.
The table data is restored to its original state after you clear what you typed.
If the table data has already been filtered by the user, the search scope is the filtered data.
Similarly, filtering is filtering the search results if the user searches first, and the same is true for sorting.
Search results are generated as you type, and the search results will include auto-completed results.
